name: Latin American Pawn Shop
description_short: Orlando-based pawn shop buying and lending against jewelry, watches, electronics, tools, and vehicles. Advertises 10% pawn loan interest rates with no credit checks.
description_long:
Latin American Pawn operates as a collateral-based lending and goods-buying business with two locations in Orlando, Florida. The company positions itself as a pawn shop serving the local community with services spanning both lending against personal property and direct purchase of used items.

The company's core offerings include: pawn loans secured by jewelry, electronics, tools, vehicles, and watches; direct cash purchases for jewelry, luxury watches (Rolex, Patek Philippe), electronics, and vehicles; and pawn loan servicing with an online payment portal. They emphasize accessibility by advertising no credit checks and loans of any size, alongside competitive rates.

Latin American Pawn distinguishes itself through marketing emphasis on low interest rates (claiming 10% for pawn loans, stated as the lowest in Orlando), professional customer service, and specialized knowledge in luxury watch evaluation and sales. The company maintains an active Google review presence with customer testimonials praising service speed, professionalism, cleanliness, and fair dealing.

As a pawn shop, the company serves a legitimate but high-cost lending function. Consumers should understand that pawn loans, even at 10%, represent significantly higher annual percentage rates than traditional credit products. The website provides limited details on loan terms, redemption periods, storage fees, or other standard pawn shop policies. Like all pawn lending, this is best suited for consumers needing immediate cash who have collateral but lack access to traditional credit.
address: 3701 S Orange Blossom Trl, Orlando, FL 32839

company_info.headquarters: 3701 S Orange Blossom Trl, Orlando, FL 32839

pros: Advertises 10% interest rate for pawn loans, claimed as lowest in Orlando market
No credit check requirement for pawn loans
Accepts loans of any size without stated minimums or maximums
Specializes in luxury watch authentication and purchase (Rolex, Patek Philippe)
Buys multiple item categories: jewelry, watches, electronics, tools, vehicles
Online payment portal for existing pawn loan customers
Two physical locations in Orlando for customer access
Positive Google reviews citing fast service and professional staff
cons: Website lacks transparency on loan terms: no redemption period, storage fees, or default policies disclosed
10% rate, while competitive for pawn shops, remains 5-10x higher than traditional personal loans or credit cards
Limited detail on vehicle lending specifics (types accepted, loan-to-value ratios, storage costs)
No information on business hours, appointment availability, or current inventory
Pawn lending carries inherent risk of losing collateral if loan cannot be repaid
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000+) who own collateral but lack credit access
Sellers of used luxury watches, jewelry, or electronics seeking quick liquidation
Consumers with vehicles or electronics they want to sell for cash without dealer intermediaries
People seeking short-term secured loans without credit inquiries or income verification
diagnosis: Latin American Pawn is appropriate for consumers needing same-day cash against collateral they own, particularly luxury watches or jewelry, and who lack traditional credit access. The primary caveat is that even the advertised 10% pawn loan rate represents extremely expensive borrowing compared to personal loans, credit cards, or credit union alternatives—this is a high-cost lender best used only when other options are unavailable.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property
Direct purchase of jewelry and gold items
Direct purchase of luxury watches (Rolex, Patek Philippe, etc.)
Direct purchase of electronics and tablets
Vehicle pawn loans or direct vehicle purchase
Two physical storefront locations in Orlando
